TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Uongu Yatauyogana == Uongu Yatauyogana(1908-1954) Uongu Yatauyogana, ngangan no Cuzo finacadan, Dipong a ngangan ci Yada inochi, kowaping ngangan ci Gao Yisen, o nano Tefue niyaro' tamdaw i Alisan no Ciayi. Pikowan no Dipong Minci 41 (1908) miheca 7 folad 5 romi'ad a masofoc. O mama ci Yata Abari, sa'ayaway mitilid to no kaDipongan kiwiko a kapah no Cuzoko no Alisan, matayal i misolapay imeng; Taiso 7 (1918) miheca, nano mipakohacan ko pifoting madoka' a mapatay. O ina ci Yada Aiko midotoc tono Cuzuko miliyaw haca mikadafo, oni ci Uongu Yatauyogana nao madipotay no matayalay i Kokyo sabisu jimusho koseki-ka no Ciayi no Taynanco a Dipong a tamdaw ci Otsuka Hisayoshi. Ona micomoday to i Fanda banfan kaemangay pitilidan i Alisan no Caiyi no Taynanco, malinah tayra i Ciayi sokakko futsu-ka mitilid. Misawad i Taiso 13 (1924) miheca kaemangay pitilidan, mapasera tayra i Taynan sihan kakko futs-ka mitilid. Minanam to ni Niche, Marukusu ticukaku harateng, saki onkako, tilidan tadamaan ko pinanam. O nika fangcal no pinanam mitilid, pakalayap to Kotaisi kara okura reta keito-dama itiya. ramasato, midama haca to nano Russia sakisowalan hakasi ci N. A.Nevskijan misolap to ka'amisay Cuzuko a sowal ato sakiniyaro'ay a tilidan, mapalalan i sakiharateng ato nengneng. Sowa 5 (1930) miheca, misawad nai Taynan sihan kakko, itira i Taban kyokai kiwiko citodongay malasingsi ato micalapay no Taban imeng. Sowa 6 (1931) miheca, mararamod to fafahiyan no finacadan Yukawa Haruko (Gao Cunfan) kaying itiya. Ci Uongu Yatauyogana o rakatay no Cuzuko Alisan mitiliday to sihan kiwiko a tamdaw, saki finacadan a harateng, nengneng to tata'ang ko nisafaloco'an, saka ira ko pisafaloco' palowad to sakowan no niyah a harateng. Saka i Sowa 7 (1932) miheca, patireng to "Taban lakepot no kapah" no Cuzuko i Alisan, citodong to kakeridan; Sowa 8 (1933) miheca, sakapot to "mapapaliway selal". Sowa 10 (1935) miheca, miteka ko Dipong pangangan to "Takasago-zoku" saan to yincumin, saka mikihatiya to "Takasago-zoku kapah kakeridan kaaini sa'opo". Nawhani o sanga'ayay a "pilifan" no Dipong ci Uongu Yatauyoganaan, kinapinapina Dayhiw no yincuminco no Taywan tayra i kasaniyaro' mihomong mirarakat; tinako Sowa 15 (1940) miheca kina tosa tayra i Dipong, mikihatiya to no Dipong "2600 miheca sician kinen lisin" a ilisin. Talacowa matiratira aca, nika ci Uongu Yatauyogana i kalaloodan to no Taypinyang itiya, tadamaan ko pilalang ningra to pitahidang no Dipong to kapah no Cuzuko tayra i nanyo malood, nao nitefocan no kasafaled cingra itiya. Macadam no Congko komintang ko Taywan i 1945 miheca i, mato sakalaheciaw sa ko nisafaloco'an ni Uongu Yatauyogana paretatenga to niyah a pikowan (Takayama jichi-ku) sanay, mato aira ko kahinatala. Dengan o kafalic to kowaping a ngangan to "Gao Yisen" sanay, raod sa mikerid to finawlan miliso' to patalaan i Ciayisi ssifo, misingsi to Sanmincuyi sakapot no kapah, ato micikeroh to midimokosay sakarihaday no Alisan niyaro'. Orasaka, mapaocor no itiyaay citodongay to kalakocio no Alisansiang. Kacitodongan ningra itiya, mipalowad ci Uongu Yatauyogana to kilakilang a palomaay, saka falic macakat ko lotokay lalan, mapadama ko kaliomah a macowat. Sato i 1347 miheca 2 folad, nawhani mapidah ko pikowan ni Cenyi to citodong no Taywansen, malengat to ko 228 kalalood. Rarawrtaw sato ko syakay itiya, matahidang no nisalofay no Ciayi wiyinhuy ci Uongu Yatauyogana, maocor aca ci Tang Shouren mikerid to kapah no Cuzuko tayra i rarem midama to sakarihaday no maci itiya. Ato tayra mmipadang to pipenec sofitay komintang, talacowa mikerid to finawlan tamdaw micamol to citodongay, nika o yincumin "finacaday ko mikowanay" sanay harateng, mala o kasasifodan to sician. Mangalef o sofitay no citodongay sifo to sapiasikaw to sakarawraw a demak, oya micoalisay a papinapina tamdaw tayra i Alisan milaliw a milimek, o kananaman to a widawidang nasa ci Uongu Yatauyogana hamhamen ningra, nika ikor sato mapakokot to sakaciraraw noni a demak. Itini i 1952 miheca 9 folad 10 romi'ad, mapakokot to mikihatiyaay to mangahay sakapot saan a marofo, itira i Taypi sofitay marofo cingra. Tangasa to i 1954 miheca 4 folad 17 romi'ad pakayni i miliyangay tatiihay (Fiti panluan cui) kaciraraw a patayen, 46 ko mihecaan itiya. Itiya 80 to'ek mihecaan matedal palasawad to ko pienec to Taywan i, o salaloma'an ni Uongu Yatauyogana misacikacikay to ko finawlan to sakalali'ayaw palasawad to pakayniay demak. Pinaay to mihecaan ko pisa'icel, itiya to mirerid ko sifo citodongay o sician a patelac a demakan, o sincenyin wencienhuy pasadakay to 'orip a demak ni Uongu Yatauyogana. Tona pinapina miheca o hakasi saki ni Uongu Yatauyogana a todong mikingkiw macowat, o Soranokotowari daykako no Dipong patireng to "Uongu Yatauyogana kingkiwkay", pasadak mikingkiw to tilidan.
S.PHON: == o~u~uo~uŋo~u~u jatao~u~ujo~u*ana == o~u~uo~uŋo~u~u jatao~u~ujo~u*ana(****-****) o~u~uo~uŋo~u~u jatao~u~ujo~u*ana, ŋaŋan no~u ʦo~u~u*o~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan, ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a ŋaŋan ʦi jaɬ~ɮa ino~uʦħi, ko~uwapiŋ ŋaŋan ʦi *ao~u jisən, o~u nano~u təfo~u~uə nijaro~uʡ tamɬ~ɮaw i aɾisan no~u ʦiaji. piko~uwan no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ minʦi ** (****) miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ a maso~ufo~uʦ. o~u mama ʦi jata ab~b~vari, saʡajawaj mitiɾiɬ~ɮ to~u no~u kaɬ~ɮipo~uŋan kiwiko~u a kapaħ no~u ʦo~u~u*o~uko~u no~u aɾisan, matajaɾ i miso~uɾapaj iməŋ; taiso~u * (****) miħəʦa, nano~u mipako~uħaʦan ko~u pifo~utiŋ maɬ~ɮo~ukaʡ a mapataj. o~u ina ʦi jaɬ~ɮa aiko~u miɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ to~uno~u ʦo~u~u*o~u~uko~u miɾijaw ħaʦa mikaɬ~ɮafo~u, o~uni ʦi o~u~uo~uŋo~u~u jatao~u~ujo~u*ana nao~u maɬ~ɮipo~utaj no~u matajaɾaj i ko~ukjo~u sab~b~viso~u~u jimo~u~usħo~u ko~usəki-ka no~u ʦiaji no~u tajnanʦo~u a ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a tamɬ~ɮaw ʦi o~utso~u~uka ħisajo~usħi. o~una miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮaj to~u i fanɬ~ɮa b~b~vanfan kaəmaŋaj pitiɾiɬ~ɮan i aɾisan no~u ʦaiji no~u tajnanʦo~u, maɾinaħ tajra i ʦiaji so~ukakko~u fo~u~utso~u~u-ka mitiɾiɬ~ɮ. misawaɬ~ɮ i taiso~u ** (****) miħəʦa kaəmaŋaj pitiɾiɬ~ɮan, mapasəra tajra i tajnan siħan kakko~u fo~u~uts-ka mitiɾiɬ~ɮ. minanam to~u ni niʦħə, maro~u~uko~u~uso~u~u tiʦo~u~ukako~u~u ħaratəŋ, saki o~unkako~u, tiɾiɬ~ɮan taɬ~ɮamaan ko~u pinanam. o~u nika faŋʦaɾ no~u pinanam mitiɾiɬ~ɮ, pakaɾajap to~u ko~utaisi kara o~uko~u~ura rəta kəito~u-ɬ~ɮama itija. ramasato~u, miɬ~ɮama ħaʦa to~u nano~u ro~u~ussia sakiso~uwaɾan ħakasi ʦi n. a.nəb~vskijan miso~uɾap to~u kaʡamisaj ʦo~u~u*o~u~uko~u a so~uwaɾ ato~u sakinijaro~uʡaj a tiɾiɬ~ɮan, mapaɾaɾan i sakiħaratəŋ ato~u nəŋnəŋ. so~uwa * (****) miħəʦa, misawaɬ~ɮ nai tajnan siħan kakko~u, itira i tab~b~van kjo~ukai kiwiko~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj maɾasiŋsi ato~u miʦaɾapaj no~u tab~b~van iməŋ. so~uwa * (****) miħəʦa, mararamo~uɬ~ɮ to~u fafaħijan no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan jo~u~ukawa ħaro~u~uko~u (*ao~u ʦo~u~unfan) kajiŋ itija. ʦi o~u~uo~uŋo~u~u jatao~u~ujo~u*ana o~u rakataj no~u ʦo~u~u*o~u~uko~u aɾisan mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj to~u siħan kiwiko~u a tamɬ~ɮaw, saki finaʦaɬ~ɮan a ħaratəŋ, nəŋnəŋ to~u tataʡaŋ ko~u nisafaɾo~uʦo~uʡan, saka ira ko~u pisafaɾo~uʦo~uʡ paɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u sako~uwan no~u nijaħ a ħaratəŋ. saka i so~uwa * (****) miħəʦa, patirəŋ to~u "tab~b~van ɾakəpo~ut no~u kapaħ" no~u ʦo~u~u*o~u~uko~u i aɾisan, ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ to~u kakəriɬ~ɮan; so~uwa * (****) miħəʦa, sakapo~ut to~u "mapapaɾiwaj səɾaɾ". so~uwa ** (****) miħəʦa, mitəka ko~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ paŋaŋan to~u "takasa*o~u-*o~uko~u~u" saan to~u jinʦo~u~umin, saka mikiħatija to~u "takasa*o~u-*o~uko~u~u kapaħ kakəriɬ~ɮan kaaini saʡo~upo~u". nawħani o~u saŋaʡajaj a "piɾifan" no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ʦi o~u~uo~uŋo~u~u jatao~u~ujo~u*anaan, kinapinapina ɬ~ɮajħiw no~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u no~u tajwan tajra i kasanijaro~uʡ miħo~umo~uŋ mirarakat; tinako~u so~uwa ** (****) miħəʦa kina to~usa tajra i ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ, mikiħatija to~u no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ "**** miħəʦa siʦian kinən ɾisin" a iɾisin. taɾaʦo~uwa matiratira aʦa, nika ʦi o~u~uo~uŋo~u~u jatao~u~ujo~u*ana i kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮan to~u no~u tajpinjaŋ itija, taɬ~ɮamaan ko~u piɾaɾaŋ niŋra to~u pitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u kapaħ no~u ʦo~u~u*o~u~uko~u tajra i nanjo~u maɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ, nao~u nitəfo~uʦan no~u kasafaɾəɬ~ɮ ʦiŋra itija. maʦaɬ~ɮam no~u ʦo~uŋko~u ko~umintaŋ ko~u tajwan i **** miħəʦa i, mato~u sakaɾaħəʦiaw sa ko~u nisafaɾo~uʦo~uʡan ni o~u~uo~uŋo~u~u jatao~u~ujo~u*ana parətatəŋa to~u nijaħ a piko~uwan (takajama jiʦħi-ko~u~u) sanaj, mato~u aira ko~u kaħinataɾa. ɬ~ɮəŋan o~u kafaɾiʦ to~u ko~uwapiŋ a ŋaŋan to~u "*ao~u jisən" sanaj, rao~uɬ~ɮ sa mikəriɬ~ɮ to~u finawɾan miɾiso~uʡ to~u pataɾaan i ʦiajisi ssifo~u, misiŋsi to~u sanminʦo~u~uji sakapo~ut no~u kapaħ, ato~u miʦikəro~uħ to~u miɬ~ɮimo~uko~usaj sakariħaɬ~ɮaj no~u aɾisan nijaro~uʡ. o~urasaka, mapao~uʦo~ur no~u itijaaj ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj to~u kaɾako~uʦio~u no~u aɾisansiaŋ. kaʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋan niŋra itija, mipaɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ ʦi o~u~uo~uŋo~u~u jatao~u~ujo~u*ana to~u kiɾakiɾaŋ a paɾo~umaaj, saka faɾiʦ maʦakat ko~u ɾo~uto~ukaj ɾaɾan, mapaɬ~ɮama ko~u kaɾio~umaħ a maʦo~uwat. sato~u i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, nawħani mapiɬ~ɮaħ ko~u piko~uwan ni ʦənji to~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~u tajwansən, maɾəŋat to~u ko~u *** kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ. rarawrtaw sato~u ko~u sjakaj itija, mataħiɬ~ɮaŋ no~u nisaɾo~ufaj no~u ʦiaji wijinħo~u~uj ʦi o~u~uo~uŋo~u~u jatao~u~ujo~u*ana, mao~uʦo~ur aʦa ʦi taŋ sħo~uo~u~urən mikəriɬ~ɮ to~u kapaħ no~u ʦo~u~u*o~u~uko~u tajra i rarəm miɬ~ɮama to~u sakariħaɬ~ɮaj no~u maʦi itija. ato~u tajra mmipaɬ~ɮaŋ to~u pipənəʦ so~ufitaj ko~umintaŋ, taɾaʦo~uwa mikəriɬ~ɮ to~u finawɾan tamɬ~ɮaw miʦamo~uɾ to~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj, nika o~u jinʦo~u~umin "finaʦaɬ~ɮaj ko~u miko~uwanaj" sanaj ħaratəŋ, maɾa o~u kasasifo~uɬ~ɮan to~u siʦian. maŋaɾəf o~u so~ufitaj no~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj sifo~u to~u sapiasikaw to~u sakarawraw a ɬ~ɮəmak, o~uja miʦo~uaɾisaj a papinapina tamɬ~ɮaw tajra i aɾisan miɾaɾiw a miɾimək, o~u kananaman to~u a wiɬ~ɮawiɬ~ɮaŋ nasa ʦi o~u~uo~uŋo~u~u jatao~u~ujo~u*ana ħamħamən niŋra, nika iko~ur sato~u mapako~uko~ut to~u sakaʦiraraw no~uni a ɬ~ɮəmak. itini i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, mapako~uko~ut to~u mikiħatijaaj to~u maŋaħaj sakapo~ut saan a maro~ufo~u, itira i tajpi so~ufitaj maro~ufo~u ʦiŋra. taŋasa to~u i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ pakajni i miɾijaŋaj tatiiħaj (fiti panɾo~u~uan ʦo~u~ui) kaʦiraraw a patajən, ** ko~u miħəʦaan itija. itija ** to~uʡək miħəʦaan matəɬ~ɮaɾ paɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u ko~u piənəʦ to~u tajwan i, o~u saɾaɾo~umaʡan ni o~u~uo~uŋo~u~u jatao~u~ujo~u*ana misaʦikaʦikaj to~u ko~u finawɾan to~u sakaɾaɾiʡajaw paɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u pakajniaj ɬ~ɮəmak. pinaaj to~u miħəʦaan ko~u pisaʡiʦəɾ, itija to~u mirəriɬ~ɮ ko~u sifo~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj o~u siʦian a patəɾaʦ a ɬ~ɮəmakan, o~u sinʦənjin wənʦiənħo~u~uj pasaɬ~ɮakaj to~u ʡo~urip a ɬ~ɮəmak ni o~u~uo~uŋo~u~u jatao~u~ujo~u*ana. to~una pinapina miħəʦa o~u ħakasi saki ni o~u~uo~uŋo~u~u jatao~u~ujo~u*ana a to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ mikiŋkiw maʦo~uwat, o~u so~urano~uko~uto~uwari ɬ~ɮajkako~u no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ patirəŋ to~u "o~u~uo~uŋo~u~u jatao~u~ujo~u*ana kiŋkiwkaj", pasaɬ~ɮak mikiŋkiw to~u tiɾiɬ~ɮan.
S.FORM: == Uongu Yatauyogana == Uongu Yatauyogana(1908-1954) Uongu Yatauyogana, ngangan no Cuzo finacadan, Dipong a ngangan ci Yada inochi, kowaping ngangan ci Gao Yisen, o nano Tefue niyaro' tamdaw i Alisan no Ciayi. Pikowan no Dipong Minci 41 (1908) miheca 7 folad 5 romi'ad a masofoc. O mama ci Yata Abari, sa'ayaway mitilid to no kaDipongan kiwiko a kapah no Cuzoko no Alisan, matayal i misolapay imeng; Taiso 7 (1918) miheca, nano mipakohacan ko pifoting madoka' a mapatay. O ina ci Yada Aiko midotoc tono Cuzuko miliyaw haca mikadafo, oni ci Uongu Yatauyogana nao madipotay no matayalay i Kokyo sabisu jimusho koseki-ka no Ciayi no Taynanco a Dipong a tamdaw ci Otsuka Hisayoshi. Ona micomoday to i Fanda banfan kaemangay pitilidan i Alisan no Caiyi no Taynanco, malinah tayra i Ciayi sokakko futsu-ka mitilid. Misawad i Taiso 13 (1924) miheca kaemangay pitilidan, mapasera tayra i Taynan sihan kakko futs-ka mitilid. Minanam to ni Niche, Marukusu ticukaku harateng, saki onkako, tilidan tadamaan ko pinanam. O nika fangcal no pinanam mitilid, pakalayap to Kotaisi kara okura reta keito-dama itiya. ramasato, midama haca to nano Russia sakisowalan hakasi ci N. A.Nevskijan misolap to ka'amisay Cuzuko a sowal ato sakiniyaro'ay a tilidan, mapalalan i sakiharateng ato nengneng. Sowa 5 (1930) miheca, misawad nai Taynan sihan kakko, itira i Taban kyokai kiwiko citodongay malasingsi ato micalapay no Taban imeng. Sowa 6 (1931) miheca, mararamod to fafahiyan no finacadan Yukawa Haruko (Gao Cunfan) kaying itiya. Ci Uongu Yatauyogana o rakatay no Cuzuko Alisan mitiliday to sihan kiwiko a tamdaw, saki finacadan a harateng, nengneng to tata'ang ko nisafaloco'an, saka ira ko pisafaloco' palowad to sakowan no niyah a harateng. Saka i Sowa 7 (1932) miheca, patireng to "Taban lakepot no kapah" no Cuzuko i Alisan, citodong to kakeridan; Sowa 8 (1933) miheca, sakapot to "mapapaliway selal". Sowa 10 (1935) miheca, miteka ko Dipong pangangan to "Takasago-zoku" saan to yincumin, saka mikihatiya to "Takasago-zoku kapah kakeridan kaaini sa'opo". Nawhani o sanga'ayay a "pilifan" no Dipong ci Uongu Yatauyoganaan, kinapinapina Dayhiw no yincuminco no Taywan tayra i kasaniyaro' mihomong mirarakat; tinako Sowa 15 (1940) miheca kina tosa tayra i Dipong, mikihatiya to no Dipong "2600 miheca sician kinen lisin" a ilisin. Talacowa matiratira aca, nika ci Uongu Yatauyogana i kalaloodan to no Taypinyang itiya, tadamaan ko pilalang ningra to pitahidang no Dipong to kapah no Cuzuko tayra i nanyo malood, nao nitefocan no kasafaled cingra itiya. Macadam no Congko komintang ko Taywan i 1945 miheca i, mato sakalaheciaw sa ko nisafaloco'an ni Uongu Yatauyogana paretatenga to niyah a pikowan (Takayama jichi-ku) sanay, mato aira ko kahinatala. Dengan o kafalic to kowaping a ngangan to "Gao Yisen" sanay, raod sa mikerid to finawlan miliso' to patalaan i Ciayisi ssifo, misingsi to Sanmincuyi sakapot no kapah, ato micikeroh to midimokosay sakarihaday no Alisan niyaro'. Orasaka, mapaocor no itiyaay citodongay to kalakocio no Alisansiang. Kacitodongan ningra itiya, mipalowad ci Uongu Yatauyogana to kilakilang a palomaay, saka falic macakat ko lotokay lalan, mapadama ko kaliomah a macowat. Sato i 1347 miheca 2 folad, nawhani mapidah ko pikowan ni Cenyi to citodong no Taywansen, malengat to ko 228 kalalood. Rarawrtaw sato ko syakay itiya, matahidang no nisalofay no Ciayi wiyinhuy ci Uongu Yatauyogana, maocor aca ci Tang Shouren mikerid to kapah no Cuzuko tayra i rarem midama to sakarihaday no maci itiya. Ato tayra mmipadang to pipenec sofitay komintang, talacowa mikerid to finawlan tamdaw micamol to citodongay, nika o yincumin "finacaday ko mikowanay" sanay harateng, mala o kasasifodan to sician. Mangalef o sofitay no citodongay sifo to sapiasikaw to sakarawraw a demak, oya micoalisay a papinapina tamdaw tayra i Alisan milaliw a milimek, o kananaman to a widawidang nasa ci Uongu Yatauyogana hamhamen ningra, nika ikor sato mapakokot to sakaciraraw noni a demak. Itini i 1952 miheca 9 folad 10 romi'ad, mapakokot to mikihatiyaay to mangahay sakapot saan a marofo, itira i Taypi sofitay marofo cingra. Tangasa to i 1954 miheca 4 folad 17 romi'ad pakayni i miliyangay tatiihay (Fiti panluan cui) kaciraraw a patayen, 46 ko mihecaan itiya. Itiya 80 to'ek mihecaan matedal palasawad to ko pienec to Taywan i, o salaloma'an ni Uongu Yatauyogana misacikacikay to ko finawlan to sakalali'ayaw palasawad to pakayniay demak. Pinaay to mihecaan ko pisa'icel, itiya to mirerid ko sifo citodongay o sician a patelac a demakan, o sincenyin wencienhuy pasadakay to 'orip a demak ni Uongu Yatauyogana. Tona pinapina miheca o hakasi saki ni Uongu Yatauyogana a todong mikingkiw macowat, o Soranokotowari daykako no Dipong patireng to "Uongu Yatauyogana kingkiwkay", pasadak mikingkiw to tilidan.
S.PHON: == o~u~uo~uŋo~u~u jatao~u~ujo~u*ana == o~u~uo~uŋo~u~u jatao~u~ujo~u*ana(****-****) o~u~uo~uŋo~u~u jatao~u~ujo~u*ana, ŋaŋan no~u ʦo~u~u*o~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan, ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a ŋaŋan ʦi jaɬ~ɮa ino~uʦħi, ko~uwapiŋ ŋaŋan ʦi *ao~u jisən, o~u nano~u təfo~u~uə nijaro~uʡ tamɬ~ɮaw i aɾisan no~u ʦiaji. piko~uwan no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ minʦi ** (****) miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ a maso~ufo~uʦ. o~u mama ʦi jata ab~b~vari, saʡajawaj mitiɾiɬ~ɮ to~u no~u kaɬ~ɮipo~uŋan kiwiko~u a kapaħ no~u ʦo~u~u*o~uko~u no~u aɾisan, matajaɾ i miso~uɾapaj iməŋ; taiso~u * (****) miħəʦa, nano~u mipako~uħaʦan ko~u pifo~utiŋ maɬ~ɮo~ukaʡ a mapataj. o~u ina ʦi jaɬ~ɮa aiko~u miɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ to~uno~u ʦo~u~u*o~u~uko~u miɾijaw ħaʦa mikaɬ~ɮafo~u, o~uni ʦi o~u~uo~uŋo~u~u jatao~u~ujo~u*ana nao~u maɬ~ɮipo~utaj no~u matajaɾaj i ko~ukjo~u sab~b~viso~u~u jimo~u~usħo~u ko~usəki-ka no~u ʦiaji no~u tajnanʦo~u a ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a tamɬ~ɮaw ʦi o~utso~u~uka ħisajo~usħi. o~una miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮaj to~u i fanɬ~ɮa b~b~vanfan kaəmaŋaj pitiɾiɬ~ɮan i aɾisan no~u ʦaiji no~u tajnanʦo~u, maɾinaħ tajra i ʦiaji so~ukakko~u fo~u~utso~u~u-ka mitiɾiɬ~ɮ. misawaɬ~ɮ i taiso~u ** (****) miħəʦa kaəmaŋaj pitiɾiɬ~ɮan, mapasəra tajra i tajnan siħan kakko~u fo~u~uts-ka mitiɾiɬ~ɮ. minanam to~u ni niʦħə, maro~u~uko~u~uso~u~u tiʦo~u~ukako~u~u ħaratəŋ, saki o~unkako~u, tiɾiɬ~ɮan taɬ~ɮamaan ko~u pinanam. o~u nika faŋʦaɾ no~u pinanam mitiɾiɬ~ɮ, pakaɾajap to~u ko~utaisi kara o~uko~u~ura rəta kəito~u-ɬ~ɮama itija. ramasato~u, miɬ~ɮama ħaʦa to~u nano~u ro~u~ussia sakiso~uwaɾan ħakasi ʦi n. a.nəb~vskijan miso~uɾap to~u kaʡamisaj ʦo~u~u*o~u~uko~u a so~uwaɾ ato~u sakinijaro~uʡaj a tiɾiɬ~ɮan, mapaɾaɾan i sakiħaratəŋ ato~u nəŋnəŋ. so~uwa * (****) miħəʦa, misawaɬ~ɮ nai tajnan siħan kakko~u, itira i tab~b~van kjo~ukai kiwiko~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj maɾasiŋsi ato~u miʦaɾapaj no~u tab~b~van iməŋ. so~uwa * (****) miħəʦa, mararamo~uɬ~ɮ to~u fafaħijan no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan jo~u~ukawa ħaro~u~uko~u (*ao~u ʦo~u~unfan) kajiŋ itija. ʦi o~u~uo~uŋo~u~u jatao~u~ujo~u*ana o~u rakataj no~u ʦo~u~u*o~u~uko~u aɾisan mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj to~u siħan kiwiko~u a tamɬ~ɮaw, saki finaʦaɬ~ɮan a ħaratəŋ, nəŋnəŋ to~u tataʡaŋ ko~u nisafaɾo~uʦo~uʡan, saka ira ko~u pisafaɾo~uʦo~uʡ paɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u sako~uwan no~u nijaħ a ħaratəŋ. saka i so~uwa * (****) miħəʦa, patirəŋ to~u "tab~b~van ɾakəpo~ut no~u kapaħ" no~u ʦo~u~u*o~u~uko~u i aɾisan, ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ to~u kakəriɬ~ɮan; so~uwa * (****) miħəʦa, sakapo~ut to~u "mapapaɾiwaj səɾaɾ". so~uwa ** (****) miħəʦa, mitəka ko~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ paŋaŋan to~u "takasa*o~u-*o~uko~u~u" saan to~u jinʦo~u~umin, saka mikiħatija to~u "takasa*o~u-*o~uko~u~u kapaħ kakəriɬ~ɮan kaaini saʡo~upo~u". nawħani o~u saŋaʡajaj a "piɾifan" no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ʦi o~u~uo~uŋo~u~u jatao~u~ujo~u*anaan, kinapinapina ɬ~ɮajħiw no~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u no~u tajwan tajra i kasanijaro~uʡ miħo~umo~uŋ mirarakat; tinako~u so~uwa ** (****) miħəʦa kina to~usa tajra i ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ, mikiħatija to~u no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ "**** miħəʦa siʦian kinən ɾisin" a iɾisin. taɾaʦo~uwa matiratira aʦa, nika ʦi o~u~uo~uŋo~u~u jatao~u~ujo~u*ana i kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮan to~u no~u tajpinjaŋ itija, taɬ~ɮamaan ko~u piɾaɾaŋ niŋra to~u pitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u kapaħ no~u ʦo~u~u*o~u~uko~u tajra i nanjo~u maɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ, nao~u nitəfo~uʦan no~u kasafaɾəɬ~ɮ ʦiŋra itija. maʦaɬ~ɮam no~u ʦo~uŋko~u ko~umintaŋ ko~u tajwan i **** miħəʦa i, mato~u sakaɾaħəʦiaw sa ko~u nisafaɾo~uʦo~uʡan ni o~u~uo~uŋo~u~u jatao~u~ujo~u*ana parətatəŋa to~u nijaħ a piko~uwan (takajama jiʦħi-ko~u~u) sanaj, mato~u aira ko~u kaħinataɾa. ɬ~ɮəŋan o~u kafaɾiʦ to~u ko~uwapiŋ a ŋaŋan to~u "*ao~u jisən" sanaj, rao~uɬ~ɮ sa mikəriɬ~ɮ to~u finawɾan miɾiso~uʡ to~u pataɾaan i ʦiajisi ssifo~u, misiŋsi to~u sanminʦo~u~uji sakapo~ut no~u kapaħ, ato~u miʦikəro~uħ to~u miɬ~ɮimo~uko~usaj sakariħaɬ~ɮaj no~u aɾisan nijaro~uʡ. o~urasaka, mapao~uʦo~ur no~u itijaaj ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj to~u kaɾako~uʦio~u no~u aɾisansiaŋ. kaʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋan niŋra itija, mipaɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ ʦi o~u~uo~uŋo~u~u jatao~u~ujo~u*ana to~u kiɾakiɾaŋ a paɾo~umaaj, saka faɾiʦ maʦakat ko~u ɾo~uto~ukaj ɾaɾan, mapaɬ~ɮama ko~u kaɾio~umaħ a maʦo~uwat. sato~u i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, nawħani mapiɬ~ɮaħ ko~u piko~uwan ni ʦənji to~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~u tajwansən, maɾəŋat to~u ko~u *** kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ. rarawrtaw sato~u ko~u sjakaj itija, mataħiɬ~ɮaŋ no~u nisaɾo~ufaj no~u ʦiaji wijinħo~u~uj ʦi o~u~uo~uŋo~u~u jatao~u~ujo~u*ana, mao~uʦo~ur aʦa ʦi taŋ sħo~uo~u~urən mikəriɬ~ɮ to~u kapaħ no~u ʦo~u~u*o~u~uko~u tajra i rarəm miɬ~ɮama to~u sakariħaɬ~ɮaj no~u maʦi itija. ato~u tajra mmipaɬ~ɮaŋ to~u pipənəʦ so~ufitaj ko~umintaŋ, taɾaʦo~uwa mikəriɬ~ɮ to~u finawɾan tamɬ~ɮaw miʦamo~uɾ to~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj, nika o~u jinʦo~u~umin "finaʦaɬ~ɮaj ko~u miko~uwanaj" sanaj ħaratəŋ, maɾa o~u kasasifo~uɬ~ɮan to~u siʦian. maŋaɾəf o~u so~ufitaj no~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj sifo~u to~u sapiasikaw to~u sakarawraw a ɬ~ɮəmak, o~uja miʦo~uaɾisaj a papinapina tamɬ~ɮaw tajra i aɾisan miɾaɾiw a miɾimək, o~u kananaman to~u a wiɬ~ɮawiɬ~ɮaŋ nasa ʦi o~u~uo~uŋo~u~u jatao~u~ujo~u*ana ħamħamən niŋra, nika iko~ur sato~u mapako~uko~ut to~u sakaʦiraraw no~uni a ɬ~ɮəmak. itini i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, mapako~uko~ut to~u mikiħatijaaj to~u maŋaħaj sakapo~ut saan a maro~ufo~u, itira i tajpi so~ufitaj maro~ufo~u ʦiŋra. taŋasa to~u i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ pakajni i miɾijaŋaj tatiiħaj (fiti panɾo~u~uan ʦo~u~ui) kaʦiraraw a patajən, ** ko~u miħəʦaan itija. itija ** to~uʡək miħəʦaan matəɬ~ɮaɾ paɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u ko~u piənəʦ to~u tajwan i, o~u saɾaɾo~umaʡan ni o~u~uo~uŋo~u~u jatao~u~ujo~u*ana misaʦikaʦikaj to~u ko~u finawɾan to~u sakaɾaɾiʡajaw paɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u pakajniaj ɬ~ɮəmak. pinaaj to~u miħəʦaan ko~u pisaʡiʦəɾ, itija to~u mirəriɬ~ɮ ko~u sifo~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj o~u siʦian a patəɾaʦ a ɬ~ɮəmakan, o~u sinʦənjin wənʦiənħo~u~uj pasaɬ~ɮakaj to~u ʡo~urip a ɬ~ɮəmak ni o~u~uo~uŋo~u~u jatao~u~ujo~u*ana. to~una pinapina miħəʦa o~u ħakasi saki ni o~u~uo~uŋo~u~u jatao~u~ujo~u*ana a to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ mikiŋkiw maʦo~uwat, o~u so~urano~uko~uto~uwari ɬ~ɮajkako~u no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ patirəŋ to~u "o~u~uo~uŋo~u~u jatao~u~ujo~u*ana kiŋkiwkaj", pasaɬ~ɮak mikiŋkiw to~u tiɾiɬ~ɮan.
